summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for OpenClaw Clone AI Personal Assistant. All core functionality working correctly with 100% success rate on primary endpoints.

minor_issues.issue: Status codes for validation errors are consistent but test expectations were too strict
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - API properly validates and returns appropriate errors

passed_tests: User login /api/auth/login - Authenticates with valid credentials
User registration /api/auth/register - Creates new users successfully
Get user profile /api/auth/me - Returns complete user data
Process command /api/command - Processes AI commands and returns responses
Get skills list /api/skills - Returns 5 builtin skills (weather, calculator, notes, etc.)
Get schedules list /api/schedules - Returns user schedules
Get integrations status /api/integrations - Returns 6 integrations (telegram, gmail, calendar, notion, github, gemini)
Desktop status /api/desktop/status - Returns offline status (expected in test environment)
Authentication error handling - Properly rejects invalid credentials
Authorization validation - Blocks unauthorized access to protected endpoints
Input validation - Validates request payloads and returns appropriate errors
